welcome.title: DEPLOY YOUR FLEET
welcome.description: Arrange your ships before the battle begins. Tap anywhere to continue.

tray.title: SELECT A VESSEL
tray.description: Tap a ship to pick it up, then tap a grid square to place it. Longer ships are harder to hide.

rotate.title: ROTATE
rotate.description: Tap to change orientation — horizontal or vertical. Rotate before placing a vessel.

shuffle.title: RANDOMIZE
shuffle.description: Tap to place your entire fleet at random.

playerGrid.title: YOUR FLEET
playerGrid.description: Your ships are here. Watch for incoming fire — red cells mean a hit.

enemyGrid.title: OPEN FIRE
enemyGrid.description: Tap any square on the enemy grid to launch a shell. Blue = miss. Orange = hit. Red = sunk.

divider.title: AWAIT ORDERS
divider.description: The center line shows whose turn it is. Hold fire until it's yours.

playerCounter.title: YOUR SHIPS
playerCounter.description: Your vessels still afloat. Protect them.

enemyCounter.title: ENEMY VESSELS
enemyCounter.description: Enemy ships remaining. Sink them all to win.

retreat.title: LAST RESORT
retreat.description: Hold to retreat. The battle will be lost.
